title: Critical Hit
excerpt: A critical hit is an attack result that lands with exceptional force and increases the damage the hit delivers.
markdown:
# Critical Hit

A critical hit is an attack result that lands with exceptional force and increases the damage the hit delivers.

## Rules Use

A critical hit matters only after an attack has already succeeded. It changes how the attack's damage is resolved by turning a normal hit into a stronger impact.

## Resolution Effect

- a critical hit increases the damage produced by the hit
- the attack still uses its normal target, damage type, and delivery method unless another rule changes them
- a critical hit does not create a separate attack; it changes the result of the attack that already hit

## Related Concepts

Critical hits depend on a successful [[attack_roll]] and usually produce a stronger [[damage_roll]].
